economic_notes: Nation has 7 government business enterprises including Alexis Casino Corporation, Alexis First Nation Business Trust, Alexis Band Oil & Gas Corp., Alexis Nakota Sioux Nation Business Trust, Alexis Group of Companies, Alexis Land Management Corporation, and Nakota Crossing Ltd. GBEs reported combined revenue of $49,868,773 and net income of $17,296,394 for year ended December 31, 2021. Nation's share of GBE income was $17,433,410.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to obtain sufficient audit evidence on investments in government business enterprises and long-term investments accounted for by modified equity method. Prior period restatement: deferred revenue was overstated by $1,118,888 (ISC Water Supply project $788,099 and GoA Community School Language $330,789), restating 2021 opening accumulated surplus. Nation has 7 GBEs accounted for by modified equity method with total due from GBEs of $46,175,229 on the balance sheet. Nation also has 2 consolidated subsidiaries (Northern ISGA Foundation and Alexis Board of Education). Remuneration schedule not included in the extracted text. Revenue figures include contributions carried forward netting items. ISC funding calculated as block + fixed + flexible + set + health = $8,827,501 + $11,878,821 + $2,291,602 + $0 + $5,139,895 = $29,137,819. Total government transfers includes ISC, Northern ISGA, GoA/Federal grants, Yellowhead Tribal Council, CMHC = $29,137,819 + $1,432,339 + $1,661,513 + $273,240 + $408,374 - $41,569 = $32,871,716 (adjusted for lapsed ISC). OSR includes other revenue, consultation revenue, Alexis Settlement Trust, contributions carried forward net, GBE income, trust fund income.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
High ISC dependency (80.98%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
